sections.paragraph:
ζυμόω (Hippocr. et al.; Plut., Mor. 659b; LXX) to ferment, leaven 1 Cor 5:6; Gal 5:9. Pass. (Philo, Vi. Cont. 81) Mt 13:33; Lk 13:21.—DELG s.v. ζύμη. TW.

Hippocr Hippocr = Corpus Hippocraticum, V–IV b.c.—List 5

et al. et al. = et alii (and others)

Plut Plut , I–II a.d.—List 5

LXX LXX = Septuaginta, ed. ARahlfs, unless otherwise specified—Lists 2, beg.

Philo Philo = P. of Alexandria, I b.c.–I a.d.—List 5

Vi. Vi. = Vita, Vitae

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

TW TW = Theologisches Wörterbuch zum NT; tr. GBromiley, Theological Dictionary of the NT—List 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 429
